text: Moving from the sterile openness outside the glass room, I now stand before a wall celebrating curiosity and discovery. The words 'R+D' echo a spirit of inquiry. I feel a sense of anticipation—my mind is invited to wander, to imagine the invisible threads connecting knowledge, technology, and human experience. The suggestion of blurred perception on the screen resonates deeply. I too feel slightly disoriented by my surroundings, as if clarity is always just out of reach, urging me to look closer and question what I think I understand.
